background: A sample of 49 sudden infant death syndrome (SIDS) cases had a mean birth weight of 2998 grams. Based on other births in the county, we will assume σ=800 grams.

task.query: Calculate the 95% confidence interval for the mean birth weight of SIDS cases in the county.

task.answer: Based on this sample, we have 95% confidence the population mean μ is between 2764 and 3212.

meta info.caption: SIDS.
meta info.section: 10.2 Confidence Intervals for $\mu$ When $\sigma$ Is Known
